positive: A vibrant, abstract mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains are stylized with geometric, overlapping planes of solid color. Foreground features simple, clean silhouettes of varied alpine flora and small forest animals (deer, rabbits, eagles) arranged symmetrically. Use a gradient color palette transitioning from deep indigo and periwinkle on the sky to warm coral, saffron, and burnt orange for the stylized mountain peaks. The overall style is minimalist, pop-art influenced vector illustration, suitable for apparel printing. Strong contrast, high saturation, clean edges, central composition.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, artifacts, lowres, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealism, gradients (except for the sky background), messy, grunge
